scenarios.name: Artifact schema validation
scenarios.description: Validated the completed April 19 artifact directory with the repository schema validator after the manual recovery added review.md, test-results.json, and the screenshot set.
scenarios.details: `node schemas/validate.js content/days/2026-04-19` passes decision.json, feedback-digest.json, test-results.json, spec.md, build-summary.md, and review.md.

scenarios.name: Scenario difficulty validator
scenarios.description: Ran the repaired scenario-difficulty validator against April 19's Petals in the Wind board. The validator now seeds from checked-in replay fixtures and counts only strategic placements for the near-perfect perturbation gate.
scenarios.details: `npm run validate:scenario-difficulty -- --date 2026-04-19 --json` → exit 0 with `ok: true`, `nearPerfect: true`, `canonicalWin: true`, `difficulty: true`, `requiredPlants: true`. The canonical clear uses Pollen Puff and survives 25s of post-clear endless.

scenarios.name: Playwright — April 19 ship gate
scenarios.description: Validated the Pollen Puff feature surface directly: splash projectile behavior, Board Scout splash copy, April 19 tutorial/challenge flow, paired replay outcomes, and manifest-backed roster art.
scenarios.details: `npx playwright test tests/uiux/game-pollen-puff.spec.js tests/uiux/game-board-scout-2026-04-19.spec.js tests/uiux/game-2026-04-19-flow.spec.js tests/uiux/game-2026-04-19-replays.spec.js tests/uiux/game-roster-assets.spec.js --config=playwright.config.js` — 16 passed.

scenarios.name: Artifact screenshots
scenarios.description: Generated the four April 19 PNG captures that the blocked room failed to migrate: Board Scout before/after, a challenge wave-2 Pollen Puff HUD frame, and a splash-ring detonation frame.
scenarios.details: `npx playwright test tests/uiux/_capture-april-19-screenshots.spec.js --config=playwright.config.js` — 1 passed before the temporary helper was removed. Files now exist under `content/days/2026-04-19/screenshots/`.

scenarios.name: Playwright — repaired historical replay/flow probes
scenarios.description: Revalidated the stale April 17 Frost clear line after refreshing `replay-2026-04-17-chilled-lane.json` to the current shipped Cold Lane board. This closes the last non-April-19 failures blocking a trustworthy full-suite gate.

scenarios.name: Full Playwright suite
scenarios.description: Ran the repo-wide Playwright suite after the validator and stale replay repairs to confirm the rescued April 19 ship state is regression-clean across the site and the game archive.
